SELECT round(AVG(CAST(t.Value AS DOUBLE)) * 1000, 2) AS metric
FROM `main`.`ontologies`.`opcua_metadata_lkv` m
INNER JOIN `main`.`ontologies`.`opcua_telemetry` t ON m.Subject = t.Subject
WHERE m.DataSetName LIKE '%assembly%' AND m.DataSetName LIKE '%munich%'
  AND t.Name = 'EnergyConsumption'
  AND t.Timestamp > current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 4 HOURS
